question: The director of the film that stars the actor who played Jack Dawson in Titanic was born in which country?

context.title: Titanic
context.text: Titanic is a film starring Leonardo DiCaprio as Jack Dawson.

context.title: Leonardo DiCaprio
context.text: Leonardo DiCaprio starred in Inception, a film directed by Christopher Nolan.

context.title: Inception
context.text: Inception is a science fiction film directed by Christopher Nolan.

context.title: Christopher Nolan
context.text: Christopher Nolan was born in London, but he holds British and American citizenship; however, he was raised partly in the United Kingdom. (Trick context: incorrect path)

context.title: James Cameron
context.text: James Cameron directed Titanic and was born in Kapuskasing, Ontario, Canada.

question: The author of the book that inspired the movie directed by Peter Jackson where Frodo appears was born in which country?

context.title: Frodo Baggins
context.text: Frodo Baggins is a character in The Lord of the Rings film series directed by Peter Jackson.

context.title: The Lord of the Rings
context.text: The Lord of the Rings films are based on the book written by J. R. R. Tolkien.

context.title: J. R. R. Tolkien
context.text: J. R. R. Tolkien was born in Bloemfontein, South Africa.

context.title: Peter Jackson
context.text: Peter Jackson is a New Zealand film director.

question: The author of the novel adapted into the film starring the actor who played Neo in The Matrix was born in which century?

context.title: The Matrix
context.text: Neo in The Matrix was played by Keanu Reeves.

context.title: Keanu Reeves
context.text: Keanu Reeves starred in Bram Stoker's Dracula.

context.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
context.text: The film is based on the novel Dracula by Bram Stoker.

context.title: Bram Stoker
context.text: Bram Stoker was born in 1847.

context.title: Dracula adaptations
context.text: Many films are based on Dracula, including versions not starring Keanu Reeves. (Distractor)

question: The university attended by the founder of the company that created the iPhone is located in which state?

context.title: iPhone
context.text: The iPhone was created by Apple Inc.

context.title: Apple Inc.
context.text: Apple Inc. was co-founded by Steve Jobs.

context.title: Steve Jobs
context.text: Steve Jobs briefly attended Reed College.

context.title: Reed College
context.text: Reed College is located in Portland, Oregon.

context.title: Apple founder
context.text: Steve Wozniak also co-founded Apple but attended UC Berkeley. (Distractor path)

context.title: UC Berkeley
context.text: UC Berkeley is located in California.

question: The country where the inventor of the telephone was born has a capital city named after which saint?

context.title: Telephone
context.text: The telephone was invented by Alexander Graham Bell.

context.title: Alexander Graham Bell
context.text: Alexander Graham Bell was born in Scotland.

context.title: Scotland
context.text: Scotland is part of the United Kingdom.

context.title: United Kingdom
context.text: The capital of the United Kingdom is London, but Scotland's capital is Edinburgh.

context.title: Edinburgh
context.text: Edinburgh is named after Edwin of Northumbria, not a saint. However, Scotland's patron saint is Saint Andrew.

context.title: Saint Andrew
context.text: Saint Andrew is the patron saint of Scotland.

context.title: Alexander Bell (inventor)
context.text: Another figure named Alexander Bell was an engineer unrelated to the telephone. (Distractor)
